notes: Confirmed on redken.com blog and professional shade-chart pages as acidic demi-permanent hair gloss/toner ('#1 demi-permanent hair color in the world').
Sub-ranges seen on redken.com shade-chart page: Shades EQ Gloss, Shades EQ Bonder Inside, Shades EQ Cream & Cover Plus.
Confirmed on redken.com/professional/haircolor/color-gels (permanent hair colors & developers) and in the redken.com shade-chart list.
Family also includes Color Gels Oils and Color Gels Lacquers 10 Minute per the official shade-chart page.

Listed in the current redken.com professional haircolor navigation and on the official shade-chart page (https://www.redken.com/professional/education/shade-charts); search synthesis describes it as a professional permanent color line.

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Flash Lift / Flash Lift Bonder Inside
notes: Product page verified on official Redken Australia/NZ site (lightening powder, up to 8 levels of lift, built-in bonding additive).

US site references it: redken.com Shades EQ Bonder Inside page cites '77% less hair breakage when used along with Flash Lift Bonder Inside', and redken.com blog posts describe it as Redken's lightener.

Appears in the current redken.com professional haircolor navigation menu, but no dedicated product page was fetched to confirm current availability, so status is marked unclear rather than confirmed active.

Confirmed present on redken.com: listed in the haircolor navigation and a 'Get to Know Shades ALK' resource link on the professional haircolor page; category (alkaline liquid color) not verified from a fetched product page, so left unknown.
Listed in current redken.com haircolor navigation and on the official shade-chart page; exact category (high-lift color/lightener) not verified from a product page.
Listed in current redken.com haircolor navigation; no product page fetched, category not verified.
Listed with a downloadable shade chart on redken.com/professional/education/shade-charts; commonly a men's camouflage color but category not verified on a fetched page.
Dedicated range page on wella.com US professional site: purest permanent color, 140+ shades, up to 100% grey coverage, ME+ dye technology.
Confirmed on wella.com/professional/en-US/color: permanent color with Microlight Technology, up to 100% grey coverage; also in official Wella colour brand factsheet PDF.
Confirmed on wella.com US color page and in the official Wella colour brand factsheet: ammonia-free demi-permanent, up to 28 washes; factsheet also lists Color Touch Plus variant.

Confirmed on wella.com US color page and official factsheet: zero-lift, zero-damage demi-permanent color glaze (ammonia/silicone/alcohol free, vegan); categorized here as toner/glaze per Wella's 'Zero Lift Glaze' positioning.

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Color Fresh (incl. Color Fresh Create, Color Fresh Masks)
notes: Color Fresh Create confirmed on wella.com US color page as vibrant semi-permanent palette (ammonia-, fragrance-, peroxide-free).
Official Wella colour brand factsheet PDF lists Color Fresh, Color Fresh Create, Color Fresh Masks, and Perfecton by Color Fresh.

brand_line_inventory.product_line_name: Blondor (incl. BlondorPlex, Blondor Freelights, Blondor Toner)
notes: Blondor section present on wella.com US color page; official factsheet lists Blondor, Blondor Freelights, and Blondor Toner; BlondorPlex usage confirmed on official Wella professional store blog.

Listed in Wella's official colour brand factsheet PDF (assets.ctfassets.net, Wella-published) alongside Blondor; Magma is a lighten-and-tone pigmented lightener system, so categorized as mixed_system. Not verified on the US site specifically.
Dedicated US page confirmed: heritage permanent color, 143 shades across 5 sublines (core IGORA ROYAL plus technical lines Highlifts, Fashion Lights, Absolutes, Silver Whites).
Also confirmed on the fetched schwarzkopf-professional.com/us/en/color.html landing page.
Dedicated US page confirmed: ammonia-free permanent color creme (MEA-based), 46 shades, up to 100% white coverage; successor to the ESSENSITY range.
Confirmed on fetched US color landing page: demi-permanent, ammonia-free, 68 shades, lasts up to 25 shampoos, gel or cream consistency, matched to IGORA ROYAL numbering.

Confirmed on official schwarzkopf-professional.com IGORA pages (US and CA): 'Chroma ID, our first low commitment mix & tone colour system for maximum colour intensity and zero damage' — bonding color masks (semi-permanent direct-dye system).
The fetched US color landing page references 'Express Bonding Color Masks', which corresponds to Chroma ID.
Confirmed on fetched US color landing page: 'improved BLONDME Lighteners and our truly acidic Glow Toners' — a holistic blonde system spanning lighteners and toners, so categorized mixed_system.
Confirmed on official global and Canadian IGORA pages: lightening range with bonding technology, up to 8 levels of lift. Not specifically verified on the US page.

Confirmed on goldwell.com en-US Color Guide ('TOPCHIC & TOPCHIC HiBLONDES CONTROL — permanent oxidative hair color') and on the en-GB hair color portfolio page ('a global color icon for 50+ years', incl. Topchic Can Depot System).
Confirmed on goldwell.com en-US Color Guide: ammonia-free permanent color, up to 100% grey coverage, 27 shades.

Confirmed on goldwell.com en-US Color Guide: 'COLORANCE, COLORANCE COVER PLUS, COLORANCE GLOSS TONES — demi-permanent hair color'; also on en-GB portfolio page (ammonia-free, colors and repairs in one step).
Confirmed on goldwell.com Elumen page: oxidant-free, ammonia-free, PPD-free color using only direct dyes, yet marketed as 'no damage permanent haircolor' with up to 100% grey coverage.
en-US Color Guide lists 'ELUMEN, ELUMEN PLAY & ELUMEN CARE — long-lasting or semi-permanent hair color'; Elumen Play is the semi-permanent direct-dye sister line.
Confirmed on goldwell.com en-US Color Guide under 'LIGHTDIMENSIONS SILKLIFT, BRIGHTENER, OXYCUR PLATIN & SOFT COLOR — Goldwell's best lightening line-up ever'.
Listed in goldwell.com en-US Color Guide lightening line-up and in System Products page developer-lotion compatibility lists.

Confirmed on goldwell.com en-US System Products page: 'high-definition direct dye additives' to be combined with Topchic, Topchic Zero and Colorance — an additive system rather than a standalone color line.
Confirmed on matrix.com product page (SoColor Permanent Cream Hair Color) and official 2023 Matrix haircolor manual PDF (Permanent: SoColor Pre-Bonded, SoColor 10 Min Pre-Bonded, Coil Color).
Confirmed in matrix.com site navigation and official 2023 haircolor manual PDF: ammonia-free demi-permanent (SoColor Sync Pre-Bonded), 'pre-paired' with permanent SoColor for root-to-ends services.
The 'Alchemy' sub-branding mentioned in the brief could not be verified on a fetched matrix.com page; see issue log.
Confirmed on matrix.com product page: acidic gel-cream toners with Real-Time Visible Oxidation, no lift, lasts up to 24 washes; classed as demi-permanent toner in the official 2023 manual.

Confirmed in the official 2023 Matrix haircolor manual PDF hosted on matrix.com, listed under Lighteners (Light Master, Light Master Pre-Bonded) alongside Curl Lights, Lift + Tone, Open Air Pre-Bonded, and High Riser Pre-Bonded.
Confirmed in the official 2023 Matrix haircolor manual PDF on matrix.com under Semi-Permanent ('SoColor Cult Vivids'); manual notes it is not Pre-Bonded. Semi-permanent direct-dye vivids range.
Appears in matrix.com haircolor navigation (SoColor, SoColor Sync, Super Sync, Tonal Control) but no dedicated product page was fetched, so category and status remain unverified.

issue_log.details: Direct fetch of https://www.redken.com/professional/haircolor returned mostly sign-up forms and navigation labels rather than product content; line enumeration for Redken relied on the navigation list and shade-chart page surfaced in search results (Blonde Idol, Blonde IQ, Color Fusion, Chromatics, Color Gels Lacquers, Shades ALK, Shades EQ, Color Camo).

Full product page verified only on the official Redken Australia/NZ site (redken.com.au); US redken.com confirms the line indirectly (Shades EQ Bonder Inside page and blog articles reference Flash Lift Bonder Inside). Marked region_or_market as global.
Chromatics is listed in the current redken.com haircolor navigation, but no live product page was confirmed; given long-running stylist reports of phase-out, status set to unclear.

The brief suggested 'SoColor Sync (Alchemy)'. Official matrix.com pages and the 2023 manual reference 'SoColor Sync Pre-Bonded'; the Alchemy sub-brand/relaunch name was not found on a fetched official page, so it is omitted from the verified name.
Magma verified only via Wella's official colour brand factsheet PDF (Wella-hosted Contentful asset), not on the US site; region set to global.

Chroma ID is confirmed in descriptions on official schwarzkopf-professional.com IGORA pages and corresponds to the 'Express Bonding Color Masks' block on the fetched US color landing page, but a dedicated Chroma ID product page was not directly fetched; official_line_url left null.

Goldwell's consumer-facing hair color portfolio page surfaced in search was the en-GB version; en-US verification came from goldwell.com en-US Color Guide and System Products education pages. Goldwell directs purchasing to the Kao Pro Store, so retail-level line pages are limited.
Seen only in matrix.com navigation; no product page fetched. Included with status 'unclear' and category 'unknown'.

issue_log.item: Wella Professionals::Color Renew / Perfecton / Color Fresh Masks
issue_log.details: These appear in Wella's official factsheet PDF but were not verified on live US web pages; only Color Fresh (Create/Masks) was included, grouped under the Color Fresh entry.
